summary: Vendored SGLang Triton baseline (sglang file 47979fb25, md5 b4c069aca); equivalence vs live SGLang: 21/21 bit-identical on H200 (ion-h200-8, GPU 3)
sources: KernelWiki pr-sglang-14717 (origin of the kernel family)

summary: Frozen baseline numbers, all 15 production rows, ion-h200-8 GPU 3 idle (valid=True): large rows ~3.05-3.97 TB/s (wan 5120 rows 3.05 => ~30-40% headroom vs ~4.3 achievable), tiny rows ~31us host-floor (Triton submit), interleaved A/B self-test geomean 0.9961

First native candidate, 2424/2424 correct (2415 native routes). Family A wins all 13 rows: wan 1.42x device (3.05->4.33 TB/s, AT achievable bound), tiny rows 1.47x sync (tvm-ffi submit vs Triton ~31us floor), prod04 1.49x dev. Family B device REGRESSION: select01 0.771x (45.1->58.5us), residual 0.887x — 256-thread CTA half-idle on C=3072 (1.5 vec iters) + two block-reduction rounds.
next: v2: single-pass sum/sumsq (one block_reduce2) + runtime block size 128 when tiling exactly

summary: Single-pass sum/sumsq (one block_reduce2) + runtime block size (128 when it tiles C exactly). 2424/2424 correct. select01 dev 0.771->0.895x (58.5->50.0us), residual 0.887->0.991x; sync all 15 rows >= 1.09x. Family A unchanged (wan 1.42x dev at 4.33 TB/s bound). Remaining select01 device gap (3.1 vs 3.47 TB/s) not explained by code reading -> NCU profile per mandatory pattern.

Hoisted gate copy AND scale/shift register prefetch above the LN reduction barrier (NCU select01_v2 showed un-overlapped latency: DRAM active cycles identical to baseline ~84.0k but elapsed +12.7%). REGRESSED: select01 dev 0.895->0.685x, residual 0.991->0.843x — the ~64 extra fp32 regs/thread for the modulation prefetch crushed occupancy; loss outweighed the overlap gain. Family A unaffected. 2424/2424 still correct.
next: v4 = v2 register footprint + gate-only hoist (transient regs, no retention)

summary: FINAL candidate. v2 register footprint + gate-copy hoisted above the LN reduction barrier (transient regs only). 2424/2424 correct (2415 native routes). Geomean over all 15 rows: sync_wall 1.2874x, device_ev 1.2274x, amort_wall 1.2951x. wan rows 1.42x device AT the 4.33 TB/s streaming ceiling; tiny rows ~1.47x sync (host-path, decomposed honestly); select01 0.954x dev / 1.122x sync (NCU-documented latency-vs-occupancy tradeoff, 95% of Triton device); residual 0.982x dev / 1.131x sync. PERF_FALLBACK unused; full bound analysis in docs/results.md.

In-tree SGLang export validated as the promotion arbiter. Task-owned worktree at 84e1108312b5; .cuh under jit_kernel/csrc/diffusion/, wrapper via load_jit (relative csrc path, default flags, cache_once); 18 lines route the UNCHANGED public Triton functions through try_native_* (original bodies = fallback; CustomOp layer untouched). Oracle 288/288; routing 15/15 native; parity 15/15; fp64/NC/CPU fallback checks pass. SHIPPING-PATH geomean: sync_wall 1.2513x, stream-span device 1.3269x; every row >=1.125x incl. Family B (1.149x/1.151x sync). PERF_FALLBACK empty - DEC-1 unused. valid=True idle GPU 3.

Registered-CustomOp-layer coverage added to the promotion arbiter: the two select01 rows validated and timed THROUGH CustomOp.op_registry instances (the production callsite; nn.Module dispatch + contiguity handling included). Parity 2/2 at oracle tolerances; prod07 1.139x sync / 1.161x stream, prod08 1.143x / 1.160x. FINAL promotion geomeans (CustomOp timings for the 2 registered rows, direct public functions for the other 13): sync 1.2496x, stream 1.3233x, valid=True. PERF_FALLBACK empty. Also: plan-marker hygiene cleaned from implementation comments.
commit_note: corrected from edc850f7b (HEAD at append time): the CustomOp-layer validator + this row landed in 49d90946e; 4b9e0d38d was follow-up documentation alignment only

summary: Review-mandated numerical-robustness build: LayerNorm variance restored to the CENTERED sum of (x-mean)^2 (the single-pass E[x^2]-mean^2 catastrophically cancels on large-offset rows; baseline is centered) + dispatch gate declines scale/shift dtypes narrower than x (kPackets==0 static_assert otherwise) + sentinel-safe pytest ids. Correctness 2428/2428 (3 new offset cases + 1 dtype-mix fallback-parity case). Local geomeans: sync 1.2878x / dev 1.2238x / amort 1.2911x; LN rows dev 0.933x/0.979x (centered costs one extra block reduction vs v4's 0.954x/0.982x), sync 1.114x/1.138x.

In-tree revalidation of the centered-variance build (worktree refreshed, md5-pinned patch re-applied): oracle 288/288; routing 15/15 native; direct parity 15/15; CustomOp parity 2/2; fallback checks 3/3. FINAL shipping geomeans: sync 1.2643x / stream 1.3433x; all rows positive (min 1.1258x); CustomOp rows 1.139x/1.154x sync. PERF_FALLBACK empty. valid=True idle GPU 3.
